members.name: _AllowAmends
members.summary: Returns whether or not the plugin allows commit amends.

members.name: _CheckoutBranch
members.summary: Checks out a [param branch_name] in the VCS.

members.name: _Commit
members.summary: Commits the currently staged changes and applies the commit [param msg] to the resulting commit. If [param amend] is [code]true[/code] the commit will modify the most recent commit instead.

members.name: _CreateBranch
members.summary: Creates a new branch named [param branch_name] in the VCS.

members.name: _CreateRemote
members.summary: Creates a new remote destination with name [param remote_name] and points it to [param remote_url]. This can be an HTTPS remote or an SSH remote.

members.name: _DiscardFile
members.summary: Discards the changes made in a file present at [param file_path].

members.name: _Fetch
members.summary: Fetches new changes from the [param remote], but doesn't write changes to the current working directory. Equivalent to [code]git fetch[/code].

members.name: _GetBranchList
members.summary: Gets an instance of an [Array] of [String]s containing available branch names in the VCS.

members.name: _GetCurrentBranchName
members.summary: Gets the current branch name defined in the VCS.

members.name: _GetDiff
members.summary: Returns an array of [Dictionary] items (see [method create_diff_file], [method create_diff_hunk], [method create_diff_line], [method add_line_diffs_into_diff_hunk] and [method add_diff_hunks_into_diff_file]), each containing information about a diff. If [param identifier] is a file path, returns a file diff, and if it is a commit identifier, then returns a commit diff.

members.name: _GetLineDiff
members.summary: Returns an [Array] of [Dictionary] items (see [method create_diff_hunk]), each containing a line diff between a file at [param file_path] and the [param text] which is passed in.

members.name: _GetModifiedFilesData
members.summary: Returns an [Array] of [Dictionary] items (see [method create_status_file]), each containing the status data of every modified file in the project folder.

members.name: _GetPreviousCommits
members.summary: Returns an [Array] of [Dictionary] items (see [method create_commit]), each containing the data for a past commit.

members.name: _GetRemotes
members.summary: Returns an [Array] of [String]s, each containing the name of a remote configured in the VCS.

members.name: _GetVcsName
members.summary: Returns the name of the underlying VCS provider.

members.name: _Initialize
members.summary: Initializes the VCS plugin when called from the editor. Returns whether or not the plugin was successfully initialized. A VCS project is initialized at [param project_path].

members.name: _Pull
members.summary: Pulls changes from the remote. This can give rise to merge conflicts.

members.name: _Push
members.summary: Pushes changes to the [param remote]. If [param force] is [code]true[/code], a force push will override the change history already present on the remote.

members.name: _RemoveBranch
members.summary: Remove a branch from the local VCS.

members.name: _RemoveRemote
members.summary: Remove a remote from the local VCS.

members.name: _SetCredentials
members.signature: public void _SetCredentials(String username, String password, String sshPublicKeyPath, String sshPrivateKeyPath, String sshPassphrase)
members.summary: Set user credentials in the underlying VCS. [param username] and [param password] are used only during HTTPS authentication unless not already mentioned in the remote URL. [param ssh_public_key_path], [param ssh_private_key_path], and [param ssh_passphrase] are only used during SSH authentication.

members.name: _ShutDown
members.summary: Shuts down VCS plugin instance. Called when the user either closes the editor or shuts down the VCS plugin through the editor UI.

members.name: _StageFile
members.summary: Stages the file present at [param file_path] to the staged area.

members.name: _UnstageFile
members.summary: Unstages the file present at [param file_path] from the staged area to the unstaged area.

members.name: AddDiffHunksIntoDiffFile
members.signature: public Dictionary AddDiffHunksIntoDiffFile(Dictionary diffFile, Dictionary[] diffHunks)
members.summary: Helper function to add an array of [param diff_hunks] into a [param diff_file].

members.name: AddLineDiffsIntoDiffHunk
members.signature: public Dictionary AddLineDiffsIntoDiffHunk(Dictionary diffHunk, Dictionary[] lineDiffs)
members.summary: Helper function to add an array of [param line_diffs] into a [param diff_hunk].

members.name: CreateCommit
members.signature: public Dictionary CreateCommit(String msg, String author, String id, int unixTimestamp, int offsetMinutes)
members.summary: Helper function to create a commit [Dictionary] item. [param msg] is the commit message of the commit. [param author] is a single human-readable string containing all the author's details, e.g. the email and name configured in the VCS. [param id] is the identifier of the commit, in whichever format your VCS may provide an identifier to commits. [param unix_timestamp] is the UTC Unix timestamp of when the commit was created. [param offset_minutes] is the timezone offset in minutes, recorded from the system timezone where the commit was created.

members.name: CreateDiffFile
members.signature: public Dictionary CreateDiffFile(String newFile, String oldFile)
members.summary: Helper function to create a [Dictionary] for storing old and new diff file paths.

members.name: CreateDiffHunk
members.signature: public Dictionary CreateDiffHunk(int oldStart, int newStart, int oldLines, int newLines)
members.summary: Helper function to create a [Dictionary] for storing diff hunk data. [param old_start] is the starting line number in old file. [param new_start] is the starting line number in new file. [param old_lines] is the number of lines in the old file. [param new_lines] is the number of lines in the new file.

members.name: CreateDiffLine
members.signature: public Dictionary CreateDiffLine(int newLineNo, int oldLineNo, String content, String status)
members.summary: Helper function to create a [Dictionary] for storing a line diff. [param new_line_no] is the line number in the new file (can be [code]-1[/code] if the line is deleted). [param old_line_no] is the line number in the old file (can be [code]-1[/code] if the line is added). [param content] is the diff text. [param status] is a single character string which stores the line origin.

members.name: CreateStatusFile
members.signature: public Dictionary CreateStatusFile(String filePath, int changeType, int area)
members.summary: Helper function to create a [Dictionary] used by editor to read the status of a file.

members.name: PopupError
members.summary: Pops up an error message in the editor which is shown as coming from the underlying VCS. Use this to show VCS specific error messages.

values.name: CHANGE_TYPE_DELETED
values.summary: An earlier added file has been deleted.

values.name: CHANGE_TYPE_MODIFIED
values.summary: An earlier added file has been modified.

values.name: CHANGE_TYPE_NEW
values.summary: A new file has been added.

values.name: CHANGE_TYPE_RENAMED
values.summary: An earlier added file has been renamed.

values.name: CHANGE_TYPE_TYPECHANGE
values.summary: An earlier added file has been typechanged.

values.name: TREE_AREA_COMMIT
values.summary: A commit is encountered from the commit area.

values.name: TREE_AREA_STAGED
values.summary: A file is encountered from the staged area.

values.name: TREE_AREA_UNSTAGED
values.summary: A file is encountered from the unstaged area.

constants.name: CHANGE_TYPE_NEW
constants.summary: A new file has been added.

constants.name: CHANGE_TYPE_MODIFIED
constants.summary: An earlier added file has been modified.

constants.name: CHANGE_TYPE_RENAMED
constants.summary: An earlier added file has been renamed.

constants.name: CHANGE_TYPE_DELETED
constants.summary: An earlier added file has been deleted.

constants.name: CHANGE_TYPE_TYPECHANGE
constants.summary: An earlier added file has been typechanged.

constants.name: TREE_AREA_COMMIT
constants.summary: A commit is encountered from the commit area.

constants.name: TREE_AREA_STAGED
constants.summary: A file is encountered from the staged area.

constants.name: TREE_AREA_UNSTAGED
constants.summary: A file is encountered from the unstaged area.
